reviews.originalComment:
Pengalaman menginap di hotel ini sangat memuaskan. Pelayanan staf ramah dan profesional, kamar bersih serta nyaman, dan fasilitas lengkap. Lokasinya juga strategis sehingga memudahkan aktivitas selama menginap.
Secara keseluruhan, hotel ini sangat direkomendasikan bagi siapa saja yang mencari kenyamanan dan pelayanan terbaik. Terima kasih atas pengalaman yang luar biasa.
reviews.reviewComments: The experience of staying at this hotel was very satisfying. The staff service was friendly and professional, the rooms were clean and comfortable, and the facilities were complete. The location is also strategic, making activities during the stay easier. Overall, this hotel is highly recommended for anyone seeking comfort and the best service. Thank you for the amazing experience.

reviews.originalComment:
Saya sangat terkesan dengan pengalaman menginap di hotel ini. Sejak pertama datang, pelayanan yang diberikan oleh staf begitu ramah, profesional, dan penuh perhatian. Proses check-in berlangsung cepat dan efisien, membuat saya merasa sangat dihargai sebagai tamu.
Kamar yang disediakan sangat bersih, nyaman, dan tertata rapi dengan fasilitas yang lengkap. Tempat tidurnya empuk, suasananya tenang, serta desain interiornya memberikan kesan hangat dan elegan. Saya juga sangat menikmati pemandangan dari kamar yang menambah kenyamanan selama menginap.
Fasilitas hotel seperti restoran, area santai, dan layanan kebersihan semuanya berjalan dengan sangat baik. Makanan yang disajikan pun lezat dengan variasi menu yang cukup beragam.
Lokasi hotel juga sangat strategis, mudah dijangkau, dan dekat dengan berbagai fasilitas umum. Hal ini tentu sangat membantu selama perjalanan saya.
Secara keseluruhan, pengalaman menginap di hotel ini benar-benar luar biasa dan melebihi ekspektasi saya. Saya sangat merekomendasikan hotel ini kepada siapa pun yang mencari kenyamanan, pelayanan terbaik, dan pengalaman menginap yang berkesan.
Terima kasih atas pelayanan yang luar biasa, saya pasti akan kembali lagi di lain kesempatan.
reviews.reviewComments:
I was very impressed with my stay at this hotel. From the moment I arrived, the service provided by the staff was very friendly, professional, and attentive. The check-in process was quick and efficient, making me feel very valued as a guest.  
The room provided was very clean, comfortable, and neatly arranged with complete facilities. The bed was soft, the atmosphere was calm, and the interior design gave a warm and elegant impression. I also really enjoyed the view from the room which added to my comfort during the stay.  
Hotel facilities such as the restaurant, lounge area, and cleaning services all worked very well. The food served was also delicious with a quite varied menu.  
The hotel's location is also very strategic, easily accessible, and close to various public facilities. This certainly helped a lot during my trip.  
Overall, my experience at this hotel was truly amazing and exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for comfort, top-notch service, and a memorable stay.  
Thank you for the outstanding service, I will definitely return on another occasion.
Good location, kind staff, clean room

Tidak recomend utk yg punya anak kecil balita ya say. Apa lgi kamar *** amboi buka pintu aura nya langsung wow... Tpi utk harga sgtu klw anak2 muda rame2 boleh lah. Tempat tdur empuk ax juga dingin. Cuma masalah aura aja utk bawa anak gk cocok
